$description: Component tokens for Mobile Tooltip component - a compact dark callout with a directional pointer. Supports 2 types (Simple = text only, Action = text + close icon) and 4 pointer directions (Top, Bottom, Left, Right). Figma Reference: Node ID 533-3474

$component.name: Tooltip
$component.description: A mobile tooltip component that displays a short label in a dark container with a directional arrow pointer. The simple type shows text only; the action type adds a close (X) icon button. Pointer direction (top/bottom/left/right) determines which edge the arrow attaches to and the visual reading order of the component.
$component.structure: Outer wrapper (drop shadow) containing: a dark rounded container (gray-800 background, 8px radius, 16px padding) with a text label, and a directional arrow pointer (8px × 32px) attached to one edge. The action type adds a 24px close icon to the right of the label.

type.simple: Text label only — no trailing icon
type.action: Text label with a close (X) icon button on the trailing end

direction.top: Arrow points downward from bottom edge — tooltip sits above the target
direction.bottom: Arrow points upward from top edge — tooltip sits below the target
direction.left: Arrow points rightward from right edge — tooltip sits to the left of the target
direction.right: Arrow points leftward from left edge — tooltip sits to the right of the target

usage.contexts: In-context helper labels, icon hints, action confirmations, short descriptive callouts on mobile screens
usage.features: Dark background for high contrast, directional arrow with 4 positions, optional close icon (action type), drop shadow for elevation

container.$comment: Container tokens for the tooltip body — dark rounded box holding the label and optional icon

shadow.description: Mobile tooltip container drop shadow - shadow/md - 0px 4px 8px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.1), 0px 2px 4px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.06)

arrow.$comment: Arrow/pointer tokens — the directional triangle that points toward the triggering element. Always matches the container background color.

color.description: Mobile tooltip arrow fill color - matches container background - neutral/gray-800 - #1d2939

height.description: Mobile tooltip arrow height (perpendicular depth) - 8px — consistent across all 4 directions

width.description: Mobile tooltip arrow width (span along the container edge) - 32px — consistent across all 4 directions

label.$comment: Label text tokens — the primary text content inside the tooltip container

typography.description: Mobile tooltip label typography - Inter Regular, 14px, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/regular)

color.description: Mobile tooltip label text color - neutral/white - #ffffff

icon.$comment: Close icon tokens — used only in the Action type variant. Displayed to the trailing end of the label.

size.description: Mobile tooltip action close icon size - 24px (square)

color.description: Mobile tooltip action close icon color - neutral/white - #ffffff
